description: Caloron sprint kickoff — generate DAG, create GitHub issues
_note: Stage IDs (REGISTER:*) must be replaced after running ./register_stages.sh

stages._desc: Fetch repository context for sprint planning
Generate a sprint DAG from a brief and repo context
Validate a sprint DAG for structural correctness
Store a JSON value under a key

stages._comment: Create one issue per task (fanout over tasks list)
stages._desc: Create a GitHub issue with title, body, and labels

stages._comment: Save issue_number mappings back into DagState
stages._desc: Store a JSON value under a key
